case_title: JEN O'KEEFFE VS. GENRIKH KHACHATRYAN et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,965.00 FILED BY O'KEEFFE, JEN AS TO DEFENDANT KHACHATRYAN, GENRIKH DESAI, KRUTAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT GENRIKH KHACHATRYAN WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
